sentence_reviews.text: RLVR improves a policy using rewards computed by deterministic or highly reliable verifiers such as tests, exact answers, simulators, or proof kernels.

sentence_reviews.notes: The RLVR survey directly supports RL with automatically checkable/verifiable rewards; examples such as tests, exact answers, simulators, and proof checkers match the survey scope.

sentence_reviews.text: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Outcome verifiers & executable rewards.

sentence_reviews.text: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) uses Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

edge_reviews.notes: Reinforcement learning is definitional for RLVR.
Outcome/verifiable rewards are definitional and core.
GRPO is a common RLVR optimizer, but not required by the concept.
Synthetic data is adjacent but not clearly a common dependency of RLVR from the packet citations.
